# Razorpay

Sample fixture for tests — 5 real links from https://razorpay.com/docs/llms.txt (fetched 2026-04-09).

## Quick Start

Essential documentation for getting started with Razorpay:

- [Razorpay API Documentation](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/razorpay/markdown-docs/master/api.md): Get started with Razorpay APIs and test them on Postman. Generate API Keys in Test and Live Modes.
- [About Errors](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/razorpay/markdown-docs/master/errors.md): Check the errors returned in the API responses and understand how to handle them.
- [Razorpay Payments Suite](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/razorpay/markdown-docs/master/payments.md): Explore Razorpay Payment Gateway and related products for accepting payments online and offline.
- [About Webhooks](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/razorpay/markdown-docs/master/webhooks.md): Use webhooks to get notified about events related to your Razorpay payments.
- [RazorpayX - Get Started](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/razorpay/markdown-docs/master/x.md): Create a RazorpayX account to explore seamless banking solutions.
